economic_notes: Mee-Mee-Wee-Seepi Development Corporation (100% owned) is the main enterprise subsidiary. Other subsidiaries include Nipi Marine Service Ltd., Berens River Housing Authority Inc., Berens River Log Inn Inc., 7269251 Manitoba Ltd., 1017001 Manitoba Ltd., Berens River Balmoral House Limited Partnership, and Berens River Empress House Limited Partnership. Berens River Community Bingo and Gaming Commission are unincorporated departments. Quarry leases held in relation to work by Pigeon River Contractors Ltd.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED on three bases: (1) inadequate tracking of accounts payable requiring manual reconstruction post year-end; (2) weaknesses in internal controls over cash-based revenues and expenditures in the Berens River Gaming Commission and Berens River Community Bingo, preventing satisfactory audit verification; (3) management has not completed PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations assessment. Prior year figures restated (Note 20) to correct stale-dated cheques that over-recorded expenses, affecting bank indebtedness, expenses, annual surplus and accumulated surplus for 2023. Large increase in tangible capital assets ($21.6M additions) largely due to assets under construction ($23.9M in buildings not yet amortized). ISC revenue of $46.87M is very large relative to prior year $25.03M due to recognition of prior year deferrals. No schedule of remuneration provided in the extracted statements. Province is Manitoba (MB). total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $46,866,871 + Health Canada $13,797,514 + CMHC $484,845 + Province of Manitoba $4,621,215 + First Peoples Development Inc. $956,746 (treated as federal transfer) = $66,727,191; however First Peoples Development Inc. may be own-source; using ISC + Health Canada + CMHC + Province of Manitoba = $65,770,445 rounded to $65769400 per line items. expenses_salaries_total from Note 18 object schedule = $13,967,283. Segmented salaries line shows $14,578,812 including other compensation. Gaming segment expense $724,213 included in expenses_enterprises approximation not separately broken out.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
